name: Richard Hudson
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $550,362 for Richard Hudson in U.S. House, NC-09. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
